Description: Startup the Charge Point and let it register itself at the Central System. TC_001_CS tests BootNotification with Rejected then Accepted status.
Delay the startup for a Charge Point. TC_002_CS tests GetConfiguration and ChangeConfiguration while in pending state.
Start a Charging session when first doing plugin cable. TC_003_CS tests StatusNotification(Preparing) then Authorize then StartTransaction.
Start a Charging session when first doing authorization. TC_004_1_CS tests Authorize then plugin cable then StartTransaction.

Summary: Regular Charging Session - Identification First - ConnectionTimeOut
Description: Make a connector available when connectionTimeOut is reached. TC_004_2_CS tests connector returns to Available after timeout.
Stop transaction when cable disconnected at EV side with both configs true. TC_005_1_CS tests reason EVDisconnected and status transitions.
Stop transaction when cable disconnected at EV side. TC_005_2_CS tests StopTransaction and UnlockConnector behavior.
Keep transaction active when cable disconnected at EV side. TC_005_3_CS tests SuspendedEV/SuspendedEVSE status.

Summary: Regular Start Charging Session - Cached Id
Description: Start a transaction with an id stored in the Authorization cache. TC_007_1_CS tests cache-based authorization with plugin first.

Summary: Remote Start Charging Session - Cached Id
Description: Start a transaction with an id stored in the Authorization cache via remote start. TC_007_2_CS tests RemoteStartTransaction with cached id.
Authorize a transaction using the Local Authorization List with regular start. TC_008_1_CS tests SendLocalList then Authorize then StartTransaction.
Authorize a transaction using the Local Authorization List with remote start. TC_008_2_CS tests SendLocalList then RemoteStartTransaction.
Remote start transaction with cable plugged in first. TC_010_CS tests GetConfiguration(AuthorizeRemoteTxRequests) then RemoteStartTransaction.
Remote start transaction with remote start first. TC_011_1_CS tests RemoteStartTransaction then Authorize then plugin cable.
Remote start transaction timeout. TC_011_2_CS tests connector returns to Available after connectionTimeout.
Remotely stop a transaction. TC_012_CS tests RemoteStopTransaction with reason Remote.
Hard reset a Charge Point while no transaction is active. TC_013_CS tests ChangeAvailability(Inoperative) then Reset(Hard) then BootNotification.
Soft reset a Charge Point while no transaction is active. TC_014_CS tests ChangeAvailability(Inoperative) then Reset(Soft).
Hard reset a Charge Point while a transaction is active. TC_015_CS tests Reset(Hard) with StopTransaction(reason=HardReset).
Soft reset a Charge Point while a transaction is active. TC_016_CS tests Reset(Soft) with StopTransaction(reason=SoftReset).

Summary: Unlock connector - No Session (Not fixed cable)
Description: Unlock connector with no charging session running on non-fixed cable. TC_017_1_CS tests UnlockConnector with status Unlocked.
Unlock connector with no charging session running on fixed cable. TC_017_2_CS tests UnlockConnector with status NotSupported.

Summary: Unlock Connector - With Session (Not fixed cable)
Description: Unlock connector while a transaction is ongoing on non-fixed cable. TC_018_1_CS tests UnlockConnector then StopTransaction(reason=UnlockCommand).
Unlock connector while a transaction is ongoing on fixed cable. TC_018_2_CS tests UnlockConnector with status NotSupported.
Retrieve all available or specific configuration keys. TC_019_CS tests GetConfiguration with SupportedFeatureProfiles and empty key.
Set the value of a configuration key. TC_021_CS tests ChangeConfiguration(MeterValueSampleInterval) then GetConfiguration to verify.
Send different kinds of Sampled MeterValues with a certain interval. TC_070_CS tests MeterValues with Sample.Periodic context.
Send different kinds of Clock-aligned MeterValues. TC_071_CS tests MeterValues with Sample.Clock context.
Inform Charge Point that EV Driver is not Authorized with local authorization. TC_023_4_CS tests Authorize(invalid) then StatusNotification(Preparing).
Inform Charge Point that EV Driver is not Authorized with remote start. TC_023_5_CS tests RemoteStartTransaction then Authorize(invalid).
Report a connector lock failure. TC_024_CS tests ConnectorLockFailure with status Faulted.
Reject a RemoteStartTransaction when transaction already ongoing. TC_026_CS tests RemoteStartTransaction with status Rejected.
Reject a RemoteStartTransaction on connectorId=0. TC_027_CS tests RemoteStartTransaction(connectorId=0).
Reject a RemoteStopTransaction with unknown transactionId. TC_028_CS tests RemoteStopTransaction with status Rejected.
Report a connector lock failure on unlock. TC_030_CS tests UnlockConnector with status UnlockFailed.
Reject an UnlockConnector with unknown connectorId. TC_031_CS tests UnlockConnector with status NotSupported.
Stop all transactions before going down when power failure occurs with backup power. TC_032_1_CS tests StopTransaction(reason=PowerLoss).
Stop all transactions after going down when power failure occurs without backup power. TC_032_2_CS tests BootNotification then StopTransaction.
Persist the status of connectors when power failure occurs. TC_034_CS tests ChangeAvailability(Inoperative) then power cycle then verify Unavailable status.
Cache meter values when connection loss occurred during a transaction. TC_036_CS tests MeterValues queueing during offline.
Start a transaction while being offline with valid IdTag. TC_037_1_CS tests StartTransaction with accepted status after reconnection.

Summary: Offline Start Transaction - Invalid IdTag - StopOnInvalid=false
Description: Start a transaction while offline with invalid IdTag and StopTransactionOnInvalidId=false. TC_037_2_CS tests transaction continues.

Summary: Offline Start Transaction - Invalid IdTag - StopOnInvalid=true
Description: Start a transaction while offline with invalid IdTag and StopTransactionOnInvalidId=true. TC_037_3_CS tests StopTransaction(reason=DeAuthorized).
Stop a transaction while the Charge Point is offline. TC_038_CS tests StopTransaction(reason=Local) after reconnection.
Start and stop a transaction while the Charge Point is offline. TC_039_CS tests full offline transaction lifecycle.
Reject an unknown configuration key. TC_040_1_CS tests ChangeConfiguration(key=Testing) with status NotSupported.
Reject setting a configuration key with incorrect value. TC_040_2_CS tests ChangeConfiguration(MeterValueSampleInterval
Refuse starting a transaction when Charge Point is in fault state. TC_041_CS tests StatusNotification(Faulted) then verify no transaction starts.
Request local list version when not supported. TC_042_1_CS tests GetLocalListVersion with listVersion=-1 or CallError(NotSupported).
Request local list version when list is empty. TC_042_2_CS tests SendLocalList(Full
Send a local authorization list to a Charge Point. TC_043_CS tests SendLocalList with Full and Differential update types.
Refuse a sent Local Authorization List when not supported. TC_043_1_CS tests SendLocalList with status NotSupported.
Refuse a sent Local Authorization List with old version. TC_043_2_CS tests SendLocalList with status VersionMismatch.
Refuse a sent Local Authorization List due to failure. TC_043_3_CS tests SendLocalList with status Failed.
Update firmware of a Charge Point. TC_044_1_CS tests UpdateFirmware then FirmwareStatusNotification(Downloading/Downloaded/Installing/Installed).
Firmware download fails. TC_044_2_CS tests UpdateFirmware then FirmwareStatusNotification(DownloadFailed).
Firmware installation fails. TC_044_3_CS tests UpdateFirmware then FirmwareStatusNotification(InstallationFailed).
Upload diagnostics log to specified location. TC_045_1_CS tests GetDiagnostics then DiagnosticsStatusNotification(Uploading/Uploaded).
Diagnostics upload fails. TC_045_2_CS tests GetDiagnostics then DiagnosticsStatusNotification(UploadFailed).
Reserve a connector and start a local transaction. TC_046_1_CS tests ReserveNow then Authorize then StartTransaction with reservationId.
Reserve a connector and start a remote transaction. TC_046_2_CS tests ReserveNow then RemoteStartTransaction.
Reserve a connector and let reservation expire. TC_047_CS tests ReserveNow then wait for expiry then StatusNotification(Available).
Reserve a connector that is in Faulted state. TC_048_1_CS tests ReserveNow with status Faulted.
Reserve a connector that is Occupied. TC_048_2_CS tests ReserveNow with status Occupied.
Reserve a connector that is Unavailable. TC_048_3_CS tests ReserveNow with status Unavailable.
Reserve a connector when Reservation not supported. TC_048_4_CS tests ReserveNow with status Rejected.
Reserve an unspecified connector (connectorId=0) and start transaction. TC_049_CS tests ReserveNow(connectorId=0).
Reserve an unspecified connector when ChargePoint is Faulted. TC_050_1_CS tests ReserveNow(connectorId=0) with status Faulted.
Reserve an unspecified connector when all connectors are Occupied. TC_050_2_CS tests ReserveNow(connectorId=0) with status Occupied.
Reserve an unspecified connector when ChargePoint is Unavailable. TC_050_3_CS tests ReserveNow(connectorId=0) with status Unavailable.
Reserve an unspecified connector when Reservation not supported. TC_050_4_CS tests ReserveNow(connectorId=0) with status Rejected.
Cancel an existing not expired reservation. TC_051_CS tests CancelReservation then verify connector Available.
Cancel reservation with unknown reservationId. TC_052_CS tests CancelReservation with status Rejected.
Use a reserved connector with parentIdTag via local start. TC_053_1_CS tests ReserveNow(parentIdTag) then Authorize then StartTransaction.
Use a reserved connector with parentIdTag via remote start. TC_053_2_CS tests ReserveNow(parentIdTag) then RemoteStartTransaction.
Trigger various messages from the Charge Point. TC_054_CS tests TriggerMessage for MeterValues/Heartbeat/StatusNotification/DiagnosticsStatusNotification.
Trigger a message that is rejected. TC_055_CS tests TriggerMessage(connectorId=NumberOfConnectors+1) with status Rejected.
Set a default schedule for new transactions. TC_056_CS tests SetChargingProfile(TxDefaultProfile) then GetCompositeSchedule.
Set a schedule for a running transaction. TC_057_CS tests SetChargingProfile(TxProfile) then GetCompositeSchedule.
Reject a schedule with wrong ChargingProfilePurpose when no transaction running. TC_058_1_CS tests SetChargingProfile(TxProfile) with status Rejected.
Reject a schedule with wrong transactionId. TC_058_2_CS tests SetChargingProfile with wrong transactionId and status Rejected.
Start a transaction with a ChargingProfile from Central System. TC_059_CS tests RemoteStartTransaction with TxProfile then GetCompositeSchedule.
Reject a remote start with wrong ChargingProfilePurpose. TC_060_CS tests RemoteStartTransaction with non-TxProfile purpose.
Clear Authorization Cache via local action. TC_061_1_CS tests ClearCache then verify authorization cache is cleared.
Clear Authorization Cache via remote action. TC_061_2_CS tests ClearCache then execute Charging state.
Send a vendor specific message to a Charge Point. TC_062_CS tests DataTransfer with unknown vendorId.
Send 3 ChargingProfiles and request composite schedule. TC_066_CS tests GetCompositeSchedule with multiple stacked profiles.
Set and clear charging profiles. TC_067_CS tests ClearChargingProfile by ID/purpose/all then GetCompositeSchedule.
Stop transaction with same idTag used to start. TC_068_CS tests StopTransaction when idTag matches StartTransaction idTag.
Stop transaction with same ParentIdTag. TC_069_CS tests Authorize(different idTag with same parentIdTag) then StopTransaction.
Stack multiple ChargingProfiles and verify composite schedule. TC_072_CS tests two TxDefaultProfiles at different stack levels.
Configure a new password for HTTP Basic Authentication. TC_073_CS tests ChangeConfiguration(AuthorizationKey) then reconnect with new password.
Renew ChargePointCertificate by request of Central System. TC_074_CS tests ExtendedTriggerMessage(SignChargePointCertificate) then CertificateSigned.
Install a new manufacturer root certificate. TC_075_1_CS tests InstallCertificate(ManufacturerRootCertificate) then GetInstalledCertificateIds.
Install a new Central System root certificate. TC_075_2_CS tests InstallCertificate(CentralSystemRootCertificate) then GetInstalledCertificateIds.
Delete an installed certificate. TC_076_CS tests GetInstalledCertificateIds then DeleteCertificate then verify removal.
Notify Central System of invalid ChargePointCertificate. TC_077_CS tests ExtendedTriggerMessage then CertificateSigned(invalid) then SecurityEventNotification.
Notify Central System of invalid CentralSystemCertificate. TC_078_CS tests invalid server certificate then SecurityEventNotification.
Upload security log to specified location. TC_079_CS tests GetLog(SecurityLog) then LogStatusNotification(Uploading/Uploaded).
Update firmware in a secure way. TC_080_CS tests SignedUpdateFirmware then SignedFirmwareStatusNotification sequence.
Validate firmware signature and reject if invalid. TC_081_CS tests SignedUpdateFirmware(invalid signature) then SecurityEventNotification.
Set a default schedule for currently ongoing transaction. TC_082_CS tests SetChargingProfile(TxDefaultProfile) during active transaction.
Upgrade connection using higher Security Profile. TC_083_CS tests ChangeConfiguration(SecurityProfile) then Reset(Hard) then reconnect.
Reject downgrading to lower Security Profile. TC_084_CS tests ChangeConfiguration(SecurityProfile) with lower value and status Rejected.
Authenticate using Basic Authentication. TC_085_CS tests HTTP upgrade with Authorization header.
Setup secured WebSocket with server-side certificate. TC_086_CS tests TLS handshake with valid server certificate.
Setup secured WebSocket with client-side certificate. TC_087_CS tests TLS handshake with valid client certificate.
Restore OCTT configuration to default values. Built-in maintenance task.
Stop all active transactions on the SUT. Built-in maintenance task.
Clear the authorization cache on the SUT. Built-in maintenance task.
Clear the local authorization list on the SUT. Built-in maintenance task.
Restore all connectors to Available state. Built-in maintenance task.
Perform a hard reset on the SUT. Built-in maintenance task.
